name: solopreneur-engine
description: Complete solopreneur launch engine: validates the idea (Mom Test framework, 5-dimension scoring), scans the market (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, gaps, positioning), runs a strategy tournament (LEAN vs PREMIUM vs GROWTH, weighted scoring), generates a full business plan (MVP scope, pricing tiers, 90-day timeline, first-10-customers playbook), produces ready-to-send outreach (5 cold email variants, 5 LinkedIn sequences, 10 social posts, full landing page copy), and builds an operating system (daily routine, weekly rhythm, KPI dashboard, tool stack, automation opportunities). Tell me your idea, get a launchable business back.
